name: Wolf

abilities.name: Pack Howl
abilities.description: The wolf howls, emboldening its attack.

description: A grey wolf with hungry eyes.

name: Dire Wolf

abilities.name: Savage Bite
abilities.description: The dire wolf lunges with a bone-crushing bite.

description: A massive wolf with scarred flanks and teeth like daggers.

name: Bear

abilities.name: Maul
abilities.description: The bear rears up and mauls with both paws.

description: A hulking brown bear defending its territory.

name: Cave Bear

abilities.name: Crushing Blow
abilities.description: The cave bear brings both paws down with devastating force.

description: An enormous pale bear that dwells in the deepest caverns.

name: Giant Spider

abilities.name: Venomous Bite
abilities.description: The spider sinks venom-dripping fangs into its prey.

description: A web-spinning horror the size of a large dog.

name: Giant Scorpion

abilities.name: Tail Sting
abilities.description: The scorpion strikes with its venomous tail.

description: A chitinous predator with pincers that can shear bone.

name: Wild Boar

abilities.name: Charge
abilities.description: The boar lowers its tusks and charges headlong.

description: A bristle-backed boar with razor-sharp tusks.

name: Viper

abilities.name: Lethal Venom
abilities.description: The viper injects a lethal dose of venom.

description: A coiled serpent with glistening fangs.

name: Mountain Lion

abilities.name: Pounce
abilities.description: The lion leaps from above with claws extended.

description: A tawny predator stalking silently through the rocks.

name: Giant Rat
description: A mangy rodent the size of a small dog.

name: Crocodile

abilities.name: Death Roll
abilities.description: The crocodile clamps down and rolls violently.

description: An armored reptile lurking just beneath the waterline.

name: Giant Bat
description: A leathery-winged bat with a wingspan wider than a man is tall.

name: Wyvern

abilities.name: Tail Sting
abilities.description: The wyvern lashes its barbed, venomous tail.

abilities.name: Wing Gust
abilities.description: A powerful beat of its wings sends a shockwave forward.

description: A two-legged drake circling overhead on tattered wings.

name: Skeleton
description: Bleached bones held together by dark magic, rattling with every step.

name: Skeleton Warrior

abilities.name: Shield Bash
abilities.description: The skeleton slams forward with its rusted shield.

description: An armored skeleton wielding sword and shield with eerie precision.

name: Skeleton Archer
description: A bony marksman that draws its bow with hollow, clicking fingers.

name: Zombie

abilities.name: Infectious Grasp
abilities.description: The zombie clutches with rot-blackened hands.

description: A shambling corpse driven by insatiable hunger.

name: Ghoul

abilities.name: Paralyzing Touch
abilities.description: The ghoul's claws carry a numbing curse.

description: A hunched, clawed creature that feeds on the dead.

name: Wraith

abilities.name: Life Drain
abilities.description: The wraith siphons the life force from its victim.

description: A tattered shade that drifts through walls and flesh alike.

name: Spectre

abilities.name: Ethereal Touch
abilities.description: The spectre's hand passes through armor to grip the soul.

description: A translucent apparition flickering between this world and the next.

name: Revenant

abilities.name: Undying Fury
abilities.description: Hatred beyond death fuels a devastating strike.

abilities.name: Soul Rend
abilities.description: The revenant tears at the target's very essence.

description: A vengeful corpse risen with a singular, murderous purpose.

name: Bone Golem

abilities.name: Bone Crush
abilities.description: The golem smashes down with fists of fused bone.

description: A towering construct assembled from hundreds of skeletal remains.

name: Lich

abilities.name: Necrotic Bolt
abilities.description: A bolt of pure death energy streaks toward the target.

abilities.name: Frost Nova
abilities.description: A wave of freezing energy erupts outward.

abilities.name: Dark Ritual
abilities.description: The lich channels forbidden magic for a devastating blast.

description: An ancient sorcerer who traded mortality for eternal, undying power.

name: Bandit
description: A desperate outlaw looking for easy coin.

name: Bandit Leader

abilities.name: Rally
abilities.description: The leader rallies with a fierce battle cry.

description: A scarred veteran who commands loyalty through fear and gold.

name: Cultist

abilities.name: Shadow Bolt
abilities.description: A crackling bolt of dark energy flies from the cultist's hand.

description: A hooded fanatic muttering dark prayers.

name: Cult Priest

abilities.name: Dark Heal
abilities.description: The priest channels dark energy to mend its wounds.

abilities.name: Shadow Bolt
abilities.description: A heavy bolt of shadow energy strikes the target.

description: A sinister cleric who communes with entities beyond the veil.

name: Pirate
description: A sun-weathered seafarer with a cutlass and bad intentions.

name: Pirate Captain

abilities.name: Cutlass Fury
abilities.description: A whirlwind of slashing steel.

abilities.name: Pistol Shot
abilities.description: The captain fires a black-powder pistol at close range.

description: A notorious captain whose name is whispered in every port.

name: Goblin
description: A small, green-skinned scavenger clutching a rusty blade.

name: Goblin Shaman

abilities.name: Fire Spark
abilities.description: The shaman hurls a sputtering ball of flame.

description: A cackling goblin draped in feathers and totems.

name: Orc Warrior

abilities.name: Cleave
abilities.description: The orc swings its axe in a wide, brutal arc.

description: A tusked brute in crude iron armor.

name: Orc Berserker

abilities.name: Frenzy
abilities.description: The berserker enters a blind, foaming rage.

abilities.name: War Cry
abilities.description: A deafening roar that shakes resolve.

description: A scarred orc frothing with battle-lust.

name: Dark Knight

abilities.name: Shadow Strike
abilities.description: The knight's blade crackles with dark energy as it falls.

description: A fallen paladin encased in blackened plate armor.

name: Assassin

abilities.name: Backstab
abilities.description: The assassin strikes from the shadows with lethal precision.

description: A masked killer who moves without sound.

name: Fire Elemental

abilities.name: Flame Burst
abilities.description: The elemental erupts in a geyser of flame.

description: A roiling column of living flame.

name: Ice Elemental

abilities.name: Frost Blast
abilities.description: The elemental hurls a shard of razor-sharp ice.

description: A jagged figure of frost that crackles with cold.

name: Lightning Elemental

abilities.name: Chain Lightning
abilities.description: Arcs of electricity leap from the elemental to its foes.

description: A humming mass of crackling energy in vaguely humanoid form.

name: Earth Elemental

abilities.name: Ground Slam
abilities.description: The elemental drives its fists into the ground, sending shockwaves outward.

description: A lumbering mass of stone and soil shaped into a hulking form.

name: Water Elemental

abilities.name: Tidal Surge
abilities.description: A wave of freezing water crashes into the target.

description: A swirling vortex of water given shape and malice.

name: Ice Golem

abilities.name: Frozen Crush
abilities.description: The golem smashes down with arms of solid ice.

description: A towering sculpture of blue-white ice animated by elemental fury.

name: Treant

abilities.name: Root Slam
abilities.description: Massive roots erupt from the ground to batter the target.

description: An ancient tree stirred to wrathful life.

name: Wisp
description: A flickering orb of pale light drifting through the trees.

name: Corrupted Treant

abilities.name: Toxic Slam
abilities.description: Blackened branches smash down, oozing toxic sap.

abilities.name: Vine Crush
abilities.description: Thorned vines constrict the target with crushing force.

description: A once-noble tree twisted by dark magic into a rotting horror.

name: Sand Golem

abilities.name: Sand Storm
abilities.description: The golem dissolves into a scouring whirlwind of sand.

description: A shifting humanoid form of compacted desert sand.

name: Phoenix Hatchling

abilities.name: Immolate
abilities.description: The hatchling wraps its target in searing flames.

abilities.name: Rebirth Flame
abilities.description: A burst of regenerative fire restores the phoenix's vigour.

description: A fledgling bird of living fire, trailing embers in its wake.

name: Storm Djinn

abilities.name: Lightning Strike
abilities.description: A bolt of lightning arcs from the djinn's fingertips.

abilities.name: Windblast
abilities.description: A concentrated gust of wind hammers the target.

description: A towering figure of wind and lightning wreathed in dark clouds.

name: Venus Mantrap

abilities.name: Digestive Acid
abilities.description: The plant sprays caustic digestive fluids.

description: A carnivorous plant with jaws large enough to swallow a man.

name: Mushroom Spore

abilities.name: Toxic Cloud
abilities.description: A cloud of choking spores billows outward.

description: A bulbous fungus that puffs toxic clouds when disturbed.

name: Bog Lurker

abilities.name: Swamp Grasp
abilities.description: Slimy tentacles erupt from the muck to seize the target.

description: A shapeless mass of mud and tendrils lurking beneath stagnant water.

name: Sand Wurm

abilities.name: Burrow Strike
abilities.description: The wurm erupts from beneath the sand with devastating force.

abilities.name: Sand Spray
abilities.description: A blast of abrasive sand blinds and shreds.

description: A colossal segmented worm that tunnels beneath the dunes.

name: Cave Crawler

abilities.name: Acid Spit
abilities.description: The crawler spits a glob of corrosive acid.

description: A pale, many-legged thing that skitters along cavern ceilings.

name: Myconid

abilities.name: Spore Burst
abilities.description: The myconid releases a burst of hallucinogenic spores.

description: A walking mushroom that communicates through clouds of spores.

name: Animated Armor

abilities.name: Shield Wall
abilities.description: The armor raises its shield in a defensive stance.

description: An empty suit of armor that moves with a will of its own.

name: Stone Guardian

abilities.name: Boulder Toss
abilities.description: The guardian hurls a chunk of masonry with terrible force.

description: A massive stone sentinel carved to guard ancient ruins.

name: Iron Sentinel

abilities.name: Iron Fist
abilities.description: The sentinel delivers a pulverizing metal punch.

abilities.name: Overcharge
abilities.description: Arcane circuits overload, releasing a lightning surge.

description: A gleaming iron automaton thrumming with arcane energy.

name: Clockwork Spider

abilities.name: Electric Jolt
abilities.description: Sparks arc between the spider's metal legs.

description: A mechanical arachnid of gears and copper wire.

name: Dragon Wyrmling

abilities.name: Fire Breath
abilities.description: The wyrmling unleashes a cone of scorching fire.

abilities.name: Tail Sweep
abilities.description: A powerful sweep of the tail sends foes flying.

abilities.name: Wing Buffet
abilities.description: A blast of wind from beating wings staggers the target.

description: A young dragon already fearsome enough to raze a village.

name: Ancient Dragon

abilities.name: Inferno Breath
abilities.description: A torrent of white-hot dragonfire engulfs everything ahead.

abilities.name: Tail Crush
abilities.description: The dragon's massive tail slams down like a falling tree.

abilities.name: Ancient Fury
abilities.description: Millennia of rage focus into a single cataclysmic blast.

description: A cathedral-sized wyrm whose mere presence warps the air with heat.

name: Demon Lord

abilities.name: Hellfire
abilities.description: Cursed flames pour from the demon's outstretched claws.

abilities.name: Shadow Rend
abilities.description: Claws of pure darkness tear through flesh and spirit.

abilities.name: Demonic Roar
abilities.description: A soul-shaking roar that weakens the will to fight.

description: A towering fiend wreathed in hellfire and shadow.

name: Hydra

abilities.name: Multi-Bite
abilities.description: Multiple heads strike simultaneously from every angle.

abilities.name: Venom Spray
abilities.description: Streams of venom arc from the hydra's many maws.

abilities.name: Regenerate
abilities.description: Severed heads regrow and wounds knit shut with alarming speed.

description: A many-headed serpent whose wounds heal as fast as they are dealt.

name: Kraken Spawn

abilities.name: Tentacle Slam
abilities.description: A massive tentacle crashes down from above.

abilities.name: Ink Cloud
abilities.description: A cloud of freezing ink obscures everything.

abilities.name: Crushing Grip
abilities.description: The spawn wraps a tentacle tight and squeezes mercilessly.

description: A writhing mass of tentacles from the deepest ocean trench.

name: Vampire Lord

abilities.name: Blood Drain
abilities.description: The vampire sinks its fangs deep, drinking deeply of life.

abilities.name: Bat Swarm
abilities.description: A swarm of bats erupts from the vampire's cloak.

abilities.name: Mesmerize
abilities.description: Hypnotic eyes freeze the target in place.

description: An ancient bloodlord cloaked in aristocratic finery and menace.

name: Giant King

abilities.name: Earthshaker
abilities.description: A colossal stomp that cracks the ground in all directions.

abilities.name: Boulder Hurl
abilities.description: The king rips a boulder from the earth and hurls it.

abilities.name: Titanic Rage
abilities.description: Blinding fury drives the king into a devastating rampage.

description: A crowned colossus who rules the mountain peaks with an iron fist.

name: Shadow Lord

abilities.name: Void Bolt
abilities.description: A bolt of absolute darkness streaks toward the target.

abilities.name: Shadow Step
abilities.description: The lord vanishes and reappears beside its prey, striking instantly.

abilities.name: Darkness Descends
abilities.description: All light dies as an overwhelming wave of shadow engulfs everything.

description: A being of pure darkness that consumes all light around it.
